title.en: Kane scores twice as England come from behind to reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 凯恩得分是英格兰队从后面到最后16分的两倍

summary.en: Harry Kane scores twice as England come from behind to beat DR Congo in a tense World Cup encounter in Atlanta, and set up a last-16 meeting with Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 在亚特兰大的一场紧张的世界杯比赛中，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）的得分是英格兰队从后面击败刚果民主共和国的两倍，并安排了与墨西哥的最后16场会议。

title.en: England sneak through - but who had a nightmare start? Player ratings
title.zh-CN: 英格兰悄悄通过-但谁有噩梦般的开始？球员评级

summary.en: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell rates the players after the World Cup comeback win over DR Congo - plus have your say.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）在世界杯复出战胜刚果民主共和国后对球员进行了评分，并发表了

title.en: 'That was a rocket' - Kane scores winner for England
title.zh-CN: “那是一枚火箭” -凯恩为英格兰队得分

summary.en: A "rocket" of a strike from Harry Kane gives England a late lead against DR Congo in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）罢工的“火箭”让英格兰队在亚特兰大对阵刚果民主共和国的比赛中取得了后

title.en: England into last 16 - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队进入16强-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在晋级16强后需要做些什么才能进入决赛

title.en: Should England have had a penalty for challenge on Kane?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰是否应该对凯恩的挑战进行处罚？

summary.en: Should England have been awarded a penalty in their World Cup last-32 tie against DR Congo?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰是否应该在他们上次32岁的世界杯对阵刚果民主共和国的比赛中被判点球？

title.en: Win over DR Congo 'our best game of the tournament' - Kane
title.zh-CN: 赢得刚果民主共和国“我们锦标赛中最好的比赛” -凯恩

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane believes the Three Lions' attacking play against DR Congo was the best they have shown so far in the World Cup after their 2-1 win in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）认为，三狮队对阵刚果民主共和国的进攻比赛是他们在亚特兰大2-1获胜后迄今为止在世界杯上表现最好的比赛。

title.en: Energy and team spirit at highest level - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: 最高级别的精力和团队精神- Tuchel

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel praises his sides team spirit as they come from behind to beat DR Congo 2-1 and advance to the round of 16.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）赞扬了他的球队精神，他们从后面以2比1击败刚果民主共和国，并晋级16强。

title.en: Relief for England as Kane heads in equalising goal against DR Congo
title.zh-CN: 对英格兰的救济，因为凯恩在对刚果民主共和国的均衡目标中处于领先地位

summary.en: Harry Kane heads in from Anthony Gordon's cross as England equalise against DR Congo in their round of 32 game in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）从安东尼·戈登（ Anthony Gordon ）的十字架上进入，因为英格兰队在亚特兰大的第32轮比赛中对

title.en: 'He is ridiculous' - Rice praise for match-winner Kane
title.zh-CN: “他很荒谬” -大米称赞比赛获胜者凯恩

summary.en: Declan Rice describes England captain Harry Kane as "ridiculous" after he scores twice during their World Cup victory over DR Congo in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）将英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）描述为“荒谬” ，因为他在亚特兰大世界杯战胜刚果民主共和国期间两次得分

title.en: Gordon was 'already celebrating' before Kane had scored the winner
title.zh-CN: 在凯恩得分之前，戈登已经在“庆祝”了

summary.en: Anthony Gordon praises England's "togetherness" in their 2-1 victory over DR Congo in their round of 32 match in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·戈登（ Anthony Gordon ）在亚特兰大的32轮比赛中以2比1战胜刚果民主共和国，称赞英格兰的“团结”。

title.en: Has football fever taken hold in the US?
title.zh-CN: 足球热在美国蔓延了吗？

summary.en: With the World Cup now three weeks old, BBC Sport's reporters in the US look at how their perceptions have changed.
summary.zh-CN: 随着世界杯现在已经举办了三周， BBC体育在美国的记者们着眼于他们的看法是如何改变的。

title.en: Quiz: Name every team England have played in World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 测验：列出英格兰队在世界杯淘汰赛中打过的每支球队

summary.en: England and Thomas Tuchel will want to match the achievements of the nation's famous side that lifted the World Cup trophy in 1966. Can you name every side they have ever faced in the knockouts?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰和托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）将希望与1966年举起世界杯奖杯的国家著名球队的成就相提并论。你能说出他们在淘汰赛中遇到的每一方吗？

title.en: Hincapie becomes second player sent off for covering mouth
title.zh-CN: Hincapie成为因捂嘴而被罚的第二名玩家

summary.en: Ecuador defender Piero Hincapie became the second player at the World Cup to be dismissed for covering his mouth while confronting an opponent.
summary.zh-CN: 厄瓜多尔后卫皮耶罗·辛卡皮（ Piero Hincapie ）成为世界杯上第二位因在与对手对抗时捂住嘴而被解雇的球员。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 24
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星24号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: More than the Score

summary.en: Cape Verde defender Sidny Lopes Cabral discusses his excitement ahead of playing Argentina
summary.zh-CN: 佛得角后卫西德尼·洛佩斯·卡布拉尔在比赛前讨论了他的兴奋

title.en: Pundits split on Kane penalty claim

summary.en: Micah Richards, Joe Hart, Wayne Rooney and Darren Cann debate whether England should have had a penalty after Harry Kane went down under a challenge from DR Congo goalkeeper Lionel Mpasi-Nzau.

title.en: Should England have been awarded a penalty?

summary.en: England's appeals for a penalty are waved away after DR Congo goalkeeper Lionel Mpasi appears to bring down Harry Kane.

title.en: 'What a save!' - Rashford's effort blocked on line by Wan-Bissaka

summary.en: Marcus Rashford's effort is cleared off the line by Aaron Wan-Bissaka as England go close to an equaliser against DR Congo in their round of 32 game in Atlanta.

title.en: Mexico set up potential England tie with win over 10-man Ecuador

summary.en: Mexico cruise into the last 16 of the World Cup with a comfortable victory over Ecuador in a weather-delayed contest at the Azteca Stadium.

title.en: Fifa explains decision to rule out Germany goal

summary.en: Fifa says coaches and players were told before the World Cup referees will punish the type of foul that saw Germany's extra-time goal against Paraguay ruled out.

title.en: Egypt optimistic Salah will be fit to face Australia

summary.en: Sources inside the Egypt camp say Mohamed Salah is winning his race to overcome a hamstring injury and play in Friday's last-32 game in Dallas.

title.en: Mexico rampant at fortress Azteca - and England could be next

summary.en: Mexico have won all four games and not conceded a goal at this World Cup. Their last-16 opponents must also contend with playing at the Azteca Stadium.

title.en: Kane keeps England's World Cup dream alive as DR Congo beaten

summary.en: Harry Kane scored a brilliant double to inspire England to a come-from-behind 2-1 win over DR Congo and set up a World Cup last-16 showdown with co-hosts Mexico.

title.en: Pure elation! How fans celebrated Kane's STUNNING winner vs DR Congo!

summary.en: A look at how fans in Manchester, Brighton and London celebrated Harry Kane's winner for England against DR Congo.

title.en: Belgium vs Senegal LIVE!
England ratings: Spence struggles as Kane, Gordon save the day

summary.en: Harry Kane and Anthony Gordon saved England as they beat DR Congo 2-1 in the round of 32, but - unsurprisingly - right-back remains a problem area as Djed Spence struggled in Atlanta.

title.en: Why Mexico could provide a HUGE UPSET against England!

summary.en: Sky Sports' Sam Blitz explains why Mexico could provide a huge challenge to England in the Round of 16 at the World Cup.

title.en: Golden Boot race: Kane keeping pace with Messi, Mbappe and Haaland

summary.en: Harry Kane kept pace with the World Cup Golden Boot contenders with his two goals against DR Congo, going level with Erling Haaland and one behind Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappe.

title.en: England latest: VOTE! How far will England go after DR Congo win?
Kane to the rescue with late double as England edge past DR Congo into last 16

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel’s mission to put a second World Cup star on the England shirt did not look as though it would reach the second knockout round. On a fraught and chaotic occasion in Atlanta, his team...
